"+m.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"cries":"cry")+" out as yet more pheromone poison is thrust into "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+", honeyed lust piling on top of honeyed lust.

, lust pulsing steadily down to your [pc.groin]
\n\n"+m.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" might not actually be able to smell it, owing to "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" airtight equipment, but the sight remains erotic nonetheless.
"+m.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" can’t help but breathe some of it in, the scent teasing and twisting down "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" throat
, sugary impulse and heat pulsing down into your [pc.groin]

"+m.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"are":"is")+" blinded!
\n\n“Give me your sorcerous toy’s best shot, land-stealer!” he cries.
